name_en: 👄FENDI Classic Bestseller Iconic Baguette Medium Handbag, flap design with FF magnetic closure, internal zip pocket. Comes with removable handle or shoulder strap, for crossbody or hand-carry. Soft 3D-textured lamb leather material 👍🏻 Full-FF pattern, gold metal hardware ❗️ Made in Italy. Model: FD8600, Dimensions: 26*15*6cm
